ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election cycle */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year the election was held */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., national, regional) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date the election was held */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats contested in the election */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the election */,
  "total_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  "party_leader" TEXT /* Current leader of the party */,
  "party_symbol" TEXT /* Electoral symbol of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_performance" (
  "party_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party performance entry */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election cycle */,
  "contested_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats contested by the party */,
  "won_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats won by the party */,
  "votes_received" INTEGER /* Total votes received by the party */,
  "vote_share" REAL /* Vote share percentage of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_performance_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_performance_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., state, union territory) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_region" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election cycle */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "seats_contested" INTEGER /* Number of seats contested in the region */,
  "seats_reserved" INTEGER /* Number of seats reserved for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_region" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the party is active in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "criminal_cases" INTEGER /* Number of criminal cases against the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_region" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "constituency_name" TEXT /* Name of the constituency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election cycle */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_social_media" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party */,
  "social_media_platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook, Instagram) */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the party */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers on the social media platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id", "social_media_platform")
)
